policies.title: Запрет входа в систему без пароля
policies.description: Отключение автоматического входа без запроса пароля для LightDM, GDM, SDDM.
policies.description_en: Disable automatic login without a password prompt for LightDM, GDM, and SDDM.

run:
mkdir -p /etc/gdm; if [ -f /etc/gdm/custom.conf ]; then if grep -q '^\[daemon\]' /etc/gdm/custom.conf; then if grep -q '^AutomaticLoginEnable=' /etc/gdm/custom.conf; then sed -i -r 's/^\s*AutomaticLoginEnable\s*=.*/AutomaticLoginEnable=false/' /etc/gdm/custom.conf; else printf 'AutomaticLoginEnable=false
' >> /etc/gdm/custom.conf; fi; else printf '[daemon]
AutomaticLoginEnable=false
' >> /etc/gdm/custom.conf; fi; else printf '[daemon]
AutomaticLoginEnable=false
' > /etc/gdm/custom.conf; fi; touch /etc/gdm/50-altcenter-no-autologin

policies.title: Запрет графического входа администратора root
policies.description: Root (UID=0) блокируется на стадии PAM; удаляются автологины root.
policies.description_en: Root (UID 0) is blocked at the PAM stage; any root autologin settings are removed.

run: set -e; for f in /etc/pam.d/lightdm /etc/pam.d/gdm-password /etc/pam.d/sddm; do [ -f "$f" ] || continue; grep -Eq '^[[:space:]]*account[[:space:]]+requisite[[:space:]]+pam_succeed_if\.so[[:space:]]+uid[[:space:]]*!=[[:space:]]*0' "$f" || printf '\naccount requisite pam_succeed_if.so uid != 0\n' >> "$f"; done

set -e; for f in /etc/lightdm/lightdm.conf /etc/lightdm/lightdm.conf.d/*.conf; do [ -f "$f" ] && sed -ri '/^\s*autologin-user\s*=\s*root\s*$/d' "$f" || true; done; for f in /etc/sddm.conf /etc/sddm.conf.d/*.conf; do [ -f "$f" ] && sed -ri '/^\s*User\s*=\s*root\s*$/d' "$f" || true; done; rm -f /var/lib/sddm/state.conf 2>/dev/null || true; command -v dconf >/dev/null 2>&1 && dconf update 2>/dev/null || true

set -e; for f in /etc/pam.d/lightdm /etc/pam.d/gdm-password /etc/pam.d/sddm; do [ -f "$f" ] || continue; sed -ri '/^[[:space:]]*account[[:space:]]+requisite[[:space:]]+pam_succeed_if\.so[[:space:]]+uid[[:space:]]*!=[[:space:]]*0/d' "$f" || true; done

set -e; rm -f /etc/lightdm/lightdm.conf.d/50-altcenter-deny-root-login.conf 2>/dev/null || true; rm -f /etc/sddm.conf.d/50-altcenter-deny-root-login.conf 2>/dev/null || true; rm -f /etc/dconf/db/gdm.d/50-altcenter-deny-root-login 2>/dev/null || true; command -v dconf >/dev/null 2>&1 && dconf update 2>/dev/null || true

policies.title: Скрыть список пользователей на экране входа
policies.title_en: Hide the user list on the login screen
policies.description: Скрывает список пользователей на экране входа и включает ручной ввод имени (LightDM/GDM/SDDM).
policies.description_en: Hides the user list on the login screen and enables manual username entry (LightDM/GDM/SDDM).

run:
mkdir -p /etc/sddm.conf.d; printf '[Users]
MinimumUid=100000
MaximumUid=999
RememberLastUser=false
' > /etc/sddm.conf.d/50-altcenter-hide-users.conf; sed -i -r '/^\s*MinimumUid\s*=.*/d;/^\s*MaximumUid\s*=.*/d;/^\s*RememberLastUser\s*=.*/d' /etc/sddm.conf 2>/dev/null || true; rm -f /var/lib/sddm/state.conf 2>/dev/null || true

rm -f /etc/sddm.conf.d/50-altcenter-hide-users.conf 2>/dev/null || true; sed -i -r '/^\s*MinimumUid\s*=.*/d;/^\s*MaximumUid\s*=.*/d;/^\s*RememberLastUser\s*=.*/d' /etc/sddm.conf 2>/dev/null || true; rm -f /var/lib/sddm/state.conf 2>/dev/null || true

policies.title: В графический вход разрешен только UID>=UID_MIN
policies.title_en: Only UID>=UID_MIN are allowed for graphical login
policies.description: В графическом входе разрешаются только UID>=UID_MIN; системные учётные записи и root скрываются в списках.
policies.description_en: Only UID>=UID_MIN are allowed at graphical login; system accounts and root are hidden from lists.

run:
set -e; UID_MIN=$(awk '/^[[:space:]]*UID_MIN[[:space:]]+/ { print $2; exit }' /etc/login.defs 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$UID_MIN" ] || UID_MIN=1000; mkdir -p /etc/lightdm/lightdm.conf.d /etc/sddm.conf.d /etc/dconf/db/gdm.d; printf 'policy:deny-system-accounts
UID_MIN=%s
[Seat:*]
minimum-uid=%s
' "$UID_MIN" "$UID_MIN" > /etc/lightdm/lightdm.conf.d/50-altcenter-deny-system-accounts.conf; printf 'policy:deny-system-accounts
UID_MIN=%s
[Users]
MinimumUid=%s
' "$UID_MIN" "$UID_MIN" > /etc/sddm.conf.d/50-altcenter-deny-system-accounts.conf; printf 'policy:deny-system-accounts
UID_MIN=%s
' "$UID_MIN" > /etc/dconf/db/gdm.d/50-altcenter-deny-system-accounts

set -e; UID_MIN=$(awk '/^[[:space:]]*UID_MIN[[:space:]]+/ { print $2; exit }' /etc/login.defs 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$UID_MIN" ] || UID_MIN=1000; for f in /etc/pam.d/lightdm /etc/pam.d/gdm-password /etc/pam.d/sddm; do [ -f "$f" ] || continue; grep -Eq '^[[:space:]]*account[[:space:]]+(requisite|required)[[:space:]]+pam_succeed_if\.so[[:space:]]+uid[[:space:]]*>=[[:space:]]*[0-9]+' "$f" || printf '\naccount requisite pam_succeed_if.so uid >= %s\n' "$UID_MIN" >> "$f"; sed -ri "s|^[[:space:]]*account[[:space:]]+(requisite|required)[[:space:]]+pam_succeed_if\.so[[:space:]]+uid[[:space:]]*>=[[:space:]]*[0-9]+|account requisite pam_succeed_if.so uid >= $UID_MIN|" "$f" || true; sed -ri '/^[[:space:]]*account[[:space:]]+sufficient[[:space:]]+pam_succeed_if\.so[[:space:]]+uid[[:space:]]*=\s*0/d' "$f" || true; done
set -e; command -v dconf >/dev/null 2>&1 && dconf update 2>/dev/null || true

set -e; for f in /etc/pam.d/lightdm /etc/pam.d/gdm-password /etc/pam.d/sddm; do [ -f "$f" ] || continue; sed -ri '/^[[:space:]]*account[[:space:]]+(requisite|required)[[:space:]]+pam_succeed_if\.so[[:space:]]+uid[[:space:]]*>=[[:space:]]*[0-9]+/d' "$f" || true; sed -ri '/^[[:space:]]*account[[:space:]]+sufficient[[:space:]]+pam_succeed_if\.so[[:space:]]+uid[[:space:]]*=\s*0/d' "$f" || true; done

set -e; rm -f /etc/lightdm/lightdm.conf.d/50-altcenter-deny-system-accounts.conf 2>/dev/null || true; rm -f /etc/sddm.conf.d/50-altcenter-deny-system-accounts.conf 2>/dev/null || true; rm -f /etc/dconf/db/gdm.d/50-altcenter-deny-system-accounts 2>/dev/null || true
set -e; command -v dconf >/dev/null 2>&1 && dconf update 2>/dev/null || true

policies.title: Запрет автодополнения имени пользователя
policies.description: LightDM: настройка применима только к lightdm-gtk-greeter; SDDM: отключается предзаполнение последним пользователем (RememberLastUser=false) и очистка state.conf; GDM: отдельной опции автодополнения нет
policies.description_en: LightDM: applies only to lightdm-gtk-greeter; SDDM: disables pre-filling the last user (RememberLastUser=false) and clears state.conf; GDM: no dedicated auto-completion option.

run:
set -e; f=/etc/lightdm/lightdm-gtk-greeter.conf; mkdir -p /etc/lightdm; [ -f "$f" ] || printf '[greeter]
' > "$f"; grep -q '^\[greeter\]' "$f" || sed -i '1s/^/[greeter]
/' "$f"; sed -ri '/^\[greeter\]/,/^\[/{s/^[[:space:]]*enter-username[[:space:]]*=.*/enter-username = false/}' "$f"; grep -Eq '^[[:space:]]*enter-username[[:space:]]*=' "$f" || printf 'enter-username = false
' >> "$f"; mkdir -p /etc/lightdm/lightdm.conf.d; printf 'enter-username=false
' > /etc/lightdm/lightdm.conf.d/50-altcenter-no-username-autocomplete.conf

set -e; mkdir -p /etc/dconf/db/gdm.d; printf 'policy:no-username-autocomplete\n' > /etc/dconf/db/gdm.d/50-altcenter-no-username-autocomplete; command -v dconf >/dev/null 2>&1 && dconf update 2>/dev/null || true

set -e; f=/etc/lightdm/lightdm-gtk-greeter.conf; mkdir -p /etc/lightdm; [ -f "$f" ] || printf '[greeter]
' > "$f"; grep -q '^\[greeter\]' "$f" || sed -i '1s/^/[greeter]
/' "$f"; sed -ri '/^\[greeter\]/,/^\[/{s/^[[:space:]]*enter-username[[:space:]]*=.*/enter-username = true/}' "$f"; grep -Eq '^[[:space:]]*enter-username[[:space:]]*=' "$f" || printf 'enter-username = true
' >> "$f"; rm -f /etc/lightdm/lightdm.conf.d/50-altcenter-no-username-autocomplete.conf 2>/dev/null || true
set -e; rm -f /etc/dconf/db/gdm.d/50-altcenter-no-username-autocomplete 2>/dev/null || true; command -v dconf >/dev/null 2>&1 && dconf update 2>/dev/null || true

policies.title: Запрос пароля при каждом sudo
policies.title_en: Always require a password for sudo
policies.description_en: Always prompt for a sudo password (timestamp_timeout=0).

run: set -e; mkdir -p /etc/sudoers.d /etc/lightdm/lightdm.conf.d; t=$(mktemp); printf 'Defaults timestamp_timeout=0\n' > "$t"; if command -v visudo >/dev/null 2>&1; then visudo -c -f "$t" || true; fi; install -m 440 "$t" /etc/sudoers.d/50-altcenter-sudo-always-ask-password; rm -f "$t"; printf 'sudo:timestamp_timeout=0\n' > /etc/lightdm/lightdm.conf.d/50-altcenter-sudo-always-ask-password.conf; for d in /run/sudo/ts /var/run/sudo/ts; do [ -d "$d" ] && rm -f "$d"/* 2>/dev/null || true; done; true

set -e; mkdir -p /etc/sudoers.d /etc/dconf/db/gdm.d; t=$(mktemp); printf 'Defaults timestamp_timeout=0\n' > "$t"; if command -v visudo >/dev/null 2>&1; then visudo -c -f "$t" || true; fi; install -m 440 "$t" /etc/sudoers.d/50-altcenter-sudo-always-ask-password; rm -f "$t"; printf 'sudo:timestamp_timeout=0\n' > /etc/dconf/db/gdm.d/50-altcenter-sudo-always-ask-password; command -v dconf >/dev/null 2>&1 && dconf update 2>/dev/null || true; true

set -e; mkdir -p /etc/sudoers.d /etc/sddm.conf.d; t=$(mktemp); printf 'Defaults timestamp_timeout=0\n' > "$t"; if command -v visudo >/dev/null 2>&1; then visudo -c -f "$t" || true; fi; install -m 440 "$t" /etc/sudoers.d/50-altcenter-sudo-always-ask-password; rm -f "$t"; printf 'sudo:timestamp_timeout=0\n' > /etc/sddm.conf.d/50-altcenter-sudo-always-ask-password.conf; for d in /run/sudo/ts /var/run/sudo/ts; do [ -d "$d" ] && rm -f "$d"/* 2>/dev/null || true; done; true
set -e; rm -f /etc/sudoers.d/50-altcenter-sudo-always-ask-password 2>/dev/null || true; rm -f /etc/lightdm/lightdm.conf.d/50-altcenter-sudo-always-ask-password.conf 2>/dev/null || true; true

set -e; rm -f /etc/sudoers.d/50-altcenter-sudo-always-ask-password 2>/dev/null || true; rm -f /etc/dconf/db/gdm.d/50-altcenter-sudo-always-ask-password 2>/dev/null || true; command -v dconf >/dev/null 2>&1 && dconf update 2>/dev/null || true; true
set -e; rm -f /etc/sudoers.d/50-altcenter-sudo-always-ask-password 2>/dev/null || true; rm -f /etc/sddm.conf.d/50-altcenter-sudo-always-ask-password.conf 2>/dev/null || true; true

policies.title: Ограничение параллельных сеансов
policies.section: Настройка учетных записей и управление доступом
policies.description: Включает pam_limits и задаёт @users hard maxlogins=1; root не затрагивается.
policies.description_en: Enables pam_limits and sets @users hard maxlogins=1; root is not affected.

run:
set -e; mkdir -p /etc/security/limits.d /etc/lightdm/lightdm.conf.d; printf '@users hard maxlogins 1
' > /etc/security/limits.d/50-altcenter-limit-parallel-sessions.conf; for f in /etc/pam.d/login /etc/pam.d/sshd /etc/pam.d/lightdm /etc/pam.d/lightdm-autologin; do [ -f "$f" ] || continue; grep -Eq '^[[:space:]]*session[[:space:]]+.*pam_limits\.so' "$f" || printf '
session required pam_limits.so # altcenter-limit-parallel-sessions
' >> "$f"; done; printf 'maxlogins=1
' > /etc/lightdm/lightdm.conf.d/50-altcenter-limit-parallel-sessions.conf; true

set -e; mkdir -p /etc/security/limits.d /etc/dconf/db/gdm.d; printf '@users hard maxlogins 1
' > /etc/security/limits.d/50-altcenter-limit-parallel-sessions.conf; for f in /etc/pam.d/login /etc/pam.d/sshd /etc/pam.d/gdm-password; do [ -f "$f" ] || continue; grep -Eq '^[[:space:]]*session[[:space:]]+.*pam_limits\.so' "$f" || printf '
session required pam_limits.so # altcenter-limit-parallel-sessions
' >> "$f"; done; printf 'maxlogins=1
' > /etc/dconf/db/gdm.d/50-altcenter-limit-parallel-sessions; command -v dconf >/dev/null 2>&1 && dconf update 2>/dev/null || true; true

set -e; mkdir -p /etc/security/limits.d /etc/sddm.conf.d; printf '@users hard maxlogins 1
' > /etc/security/limits.d/50-altcenter-limit-parallel-sessions.conf; for f in /etc/pam.d/login /etc/pam.d/sshd /etc/pam.d/sddm; do [ -f "$f" ] || continue; grep -Eq '^[[:space:]]*session[[:space:]]+.*pam_limits\.so' "$f" || printf '
session required pam_limits.so # altcenter-limit-parallel-sessions
' >> "$f"; done; printf 'maxlogins=1
' > /etc/sddm.conf.d/50-altcenter-limit-parallel-sessions.conf; true

set -e; rm -f /etc/security/limits.d/50-altcenter-limit-parallel-sessions.conf 2>/dev/null || true; for f in /etc/pam.d/login /etc/pam.d/sshd /etc/pam.d/lightdm /etc/pam.d/lightdm-autologin; do [ -f "$f" ] || continue; sed -ri '/pam_limits\.so.*altcenter-limit-parallel-sessions/d' "$f" || true; done; rm -f /etc/lightdm/lightdm.conf.d/50-altcenter-limit-parallel-sessions.conf 2>/dev/null || true; true

set -e; rm -f /etc/security/limits.d/50-altcenter-limit-parallel-sessions.conf 2>/dev/null || true; for f in /etc/pam.d/login /etc/pam.d/sshd /etc/pam.d/gdm-password; do [ -f "$f" ] || continue; sed -ri '/pam_limits\.so.*altcenter-limit-parallel-sessions/d' "$f" || true; done; rm -f /etc/dconf/db/gdm.d/50-altcenter-limit-parallel-sessions 2>/dev/null || true; command -v dconf >/dev/null 2>&1 && dconf update 2>/dev/null || true; true

set -e; rm -f /etc/security/limits.d/50-altcenter-limit-parallel-sessions.conf 2>/dev/null || true; for f in /etc/pam.d/login /etc/pam.d/sshd /etc/pam.d/sddm; do [ -f "$f" ] || continue; sed -ri '/pam_limits\.so.*altcenter-limit-parallel-sessions/d' "$f" || true; done; rm -f /etc/sddm.conf.d/50-altcenter-limit-parallel-sessions.conf 2>/dev/null || true; true

policies.title: Блокировка сеанса после простоя
policies.section: Настройка учетных записей и управление доступом
policies.description: MATE: включаем lock-enabled, idle-activation-enabled, lock-delay=0, idle-delay=10; dconf-профиль и locks; для shell — TMOUT=900; при наличии — включаем timeoutd.
policies.description_en: MATE: enable lock-enabled and idle-activation-enabled, set lock-delay=0 and idle-delay=10; install dconf profile and locks. Shells: set TMOUT=900. If available, enable timeoutd.

run:
set -e; mkdir -p /etc/lightdm/lightdm.conf.d /etc/dconf/profile /etc/dconf/db/local.d /etc/dconf/db/local.d/locks; printf '# altcenter-idle-lock
' > /etc/lightdm/lightdm.conf.d/50-altcenter-idle-lock.conf; [ -f /etc/dconf/profile/user ] || printf 'user-db:user
system-db:local
' > /etc/dconf/profile/user; printf '[org/mate/screensaver]
lock-enabled=true
idle-activation-enabled=true
lock-delay=uint32 0
idle-delay=uint32 10
' > /etc/dconf/db/local.d/50-altcenter-idle-lock; printf '/org/mate/screensaver/lock-enabled
/org/mate/screensaver/idle-activation-enabled
/org/mate/screensaver/lock-delay
/org/mate/screensaver/idle-delay
' > /etc/dconf/db/local.d/locks/50-altcenter-idle-lock; command -v dconf >/dev/null 2>&1 && dconf update 2>/dev/null || true; printf '# altcenter idle-lock
TMOUT=${TMOUT:-900}; [ "$TMOUT" -eq 0 ] 2>/dev/null && TMOUT=900; export TMOUT; readonly TMOUT 2>/dev/null || true
' > /etc/profile.d/50-altcenter-idle-timeout.sh; chmod 0644 /etc/profile.d/50-altcenter-idle-timeout.sh; systemctl list-unit-files | grep -q '^timeoutd\.service' && systemctl enable --now timeoutd.service 2>/dev/null || true; true

set -e; mkdir -p /etc/dconf/db/gdm.d /etc/dconf/profile /etc/dconf/db/local.d /etc/dconf/db/local.d/locks; printf '# altcenter-idle-lock
' > /etc/dconf/db/gdm.d/50-altcenter-idle-lock; [ -f /etc/dconf/profile/user ] || printf 'user-db:user
system-db:local
' > /etc/dconf/profile/user; printf '[org/mate/screensaver]
lock-enabled=true
idle-activation-enabled=true
lock-delay=uint32 0
idle-delay=uint32 10
' > /etc/dconf/db/local.d/50-altcenter-idle-lock; printf '/org/mate/screensaver/lock-enabled
/org/mate/screensaver/idle-activation-enabled
/org/mate/screensaver/lock-delay
/org/mate/screensaver/idle-delay
' > /etc/dconf/db/local.d/locks/50-altcenter-idle-lock; command -v dconf >/dev/null 2>&1 && dconf update 2>/dev/null || true; printf '# altcenter idle-lock
TMOUT=${TMOUT:-900}; [ "$TMOUT" -eq 0 ] 2>/dev/null && TMOUT=900; export TMOUT; readonly TMOUT 2>/dev/null || true
' > /etc/profile.d/50-altcenter-idle-timeout.sh; chmod 0644 /etc/profile.d/50-altcenter-idle-timeout.sh; systemctl list-unit-files | grep -q '^timeoutd\.service' && systemctl enable --now timeoutd.service 2>/dev/null || true; true

set -e; mkdir -p /etc/sddm.conf.d /etc/dconf/profile /etc/dconf/db/local.d /etc/dconf/db/local.d/locks; printf '# altcenter-idle-lock
' > /etc/sddm.conf.d/50-altcenter-idle-lock.conf; [ -f /etc/dconf/profile/user ] || printf 'user-db:user
system-db:local
' > /etc/dconf/profile/user; printf '[org/mate/screensaver]
lock-enabled=true
idle-activation-enabled=true
lock-delay=uint32 0
idle-delay=uint32 10
' > /etc/dconf/db/local.d/50-altcenter-idle-lock; printf '/org/mate/screensaver/lock-enabled
/org/mate/screensaver/idle-activation-enabled
/org/mate/screensaver/lock-delay
/org/mate/screensaver/idle-delay
' > /etc/dconf/db/local.d/locks/50-altcenter-idle-lock; command -v dconf >/dev/null 2>&1 && dconf update 2>/dev/null || true; printf '# altcenter idle-lock
TMOUT=${TMOUT:-900}; [ "$TMOUT" -eq 0 ] 2>/dev/null && TMOUT=900; export TMOUT; readonly TMOUT 2>/dev/null || true
' > /etc/profile.d/50-altcenter-idle-timeout.sh; chmod 0644 /etc/profile.d/50-altcenter-idle-timeout.sh; systemctl list-unit-files | grep -q '^timeoutd\.service' && systemctl enable --now timeoutd.service 2>/dev/null || true; true

set -e; rm -f /etc/lightdm/lightdm.conf.d/50-altcenter-idle-lock.conf 2>/dev/null || true; rm -f /etc/dconf/db/local.d/50-altcenter-idle-lock 2>/dev/null || true; rm -f /etc/dconf/db/local.d/locks/50-altcenter-idle-lock 2>/dev/null || true; command -v dconf >/dev/null 2>&1 && dconf update 2>/dev/null || true; rm -f /etc/profile.d/50-altcenter-idle-timeout.sh 2>/dev/null || true; systemctl list-unit-files | grep -q '^timeoutd\\.service' && systemctl disable --now timeoutd.service 2>/dev/null || true; true

set -e; rm -f /etc/dconf/db/gdm.d/50-altcenter-idle-lock 2>/dev/null || true; rm -f /etc/dconf/db/local.d/50-altcenter-idle-lock 2>/dev/null || true; rm -f /etc/dconf/db/local.d/locks/50-altcenter-idle-lock 2>/dev/null || true; command -v dconf >/dev/null 2>&1 && dconf update 2>/dev/null || true; rm -f /etc/profile.d/50-altcenter-idle-timeout.sh 2>/dev/null || true; systemctl list-unit-files | grep -q '^timeoutd\\.service' && systemctl disable --now timeoutd.service 2>/dev/null || true; true

set -e; rm -f /etc/sddm.conf.d/50-altcenter-idle-lock.conf 2>/dev/null || true; rm -f /etc/dconf/db/local.d/50-altcenter-idle-lock 2>/dev/null || true; rm -f /etc/dconf/db/local.d/locks/50-altcenter-idle-lock 2>/dev/null || true; command -v dconf >/dev/null 2>&1 && dconf update 2>/dev/null || true; rm -f /etc/profile.d/50-altcenter-idle-timeout.sh 2>/dev/null || true; systemctl list-unit-files | grep -q '^timeoutd\\.service' && systemctl disable --now timeoutd.service 2>/dev/null || true; true

policies.title: Скрыть данные сеанса на экране блокировки
policies.title_en: Hide session data on the lock screen
policies.section: Настройка учетных записей и управление доступом
policies.description: LightDM(KDE): скрыть имя пользователя, кнопки действий и медиа-контролы + отключить уведомления на лочскрине; GDM(GNOME): запрет уведомлений на лочскрине и переключения пользователей; SDDM(KDE): скрыть имя и кнопки на экране блокировки + отключить уведомления.
policies.description_en: LightDM(MATE): disable user switching; GDM(GNOME): disable lock-screen notifications and user switching; SDDM(KDE): hide username and action buttons on the lock screen.

run:
set -e; mkdir -p /etc/dconf/db/gdm.d /etc/dconf/db/local.d /etc/dconf/db/local.d/locks; printf '# altcenter-lock-hide-session-info
' > /etc/dconf/db/gdm.d/50-altcenter-lock-hide-session-info; printf '[org/gnome/desktop/notifications]
show-in-lock-screen=false

[org/gnome/desktop/lockdown]
disable-user-switching=true
' > /etc/dconf/db/local.d/50-altcenter-lock-hide-session-info; printf '/org/gnome/desktop/notifications/show-in-lock-screen
/org/gnome/desktop/lockdown/disable-user-switching
' > /etc/dconf/db/local.d/locks/50-altcenter-lock-hide-session-info; command -v dconf >/dev/null 2>&1 && dconf update 2>/dev/null || true; true

set -e; mkdir -p /etc/lightdm/lightdm.conf.d /etc/xdg; printf '# altcenter-lock-hide-session-info
' > /etc/lightdm/lightdm.conf.d/50-altcenter-lock-hide-session-info.conf; if [ -f /etc/xdg/kscreenlockerrc ] && ! grep -q '^# ALT Center: lock-hide-session-info begin$' /etc/xdg/kscreenlockerrc 2>/dev/null; then cp -a /etc/xdg/kscreenlockerrc /etc/xdg/kscreenlockerrc.altcenter.bak; fi; touch /etc/xdg/kscreenlockerrc; sed -i '/^# ALT Center: lock-hide-session-info begin$/,/^# ALT Center: lock-hide-session-info end$/d' /etc/xdg/kscreenlockerrc 2>/dev/null || true; printf '
# ALT Center: lock-hide-session-info begin
[Greeter][LnF][General]
showMediaControls[$i]=false
# ALT Center: lock-hide-session-info end
' >> /etc/xdg/kscreenlockerrc; if [ -f /etc/xdg/plasmanotifyrc ] && ! grep -q '^# ALT Center: lock-hide-session-info begin$' /etc/xdg/plasmanotifyrc 2>/dev/null; then cp -a /etc/xdg/plasmanotifyrc /etc/xdg/plasmanotifyrc.altcenter.bak; fi; touch /etc/xdg/plasmanotifyrc; sed -i '/^# ALT Center: lock-hide-session-info begin$/,/^# ALT Center: lock-hide-session-info end$/d' /etc/xdg/plasmanotifyrc 2>/dev/null || true; printf '
# ALT Center: lock-hide-session-info begin
[Notifications]
ShowInLockScreen[$i]=false
# ALT Center: lock-hide-session-info end
' >> /etc/xdg/plasmanotifyrc; true

set -e; mkdir -p /etc/sddm.conf.d /etc/xdg; printf '# altcenter-lock-hide-session-info
' > /etc/sddm.conf.d/50-altcenter-lock-hide-session-info.conf; if [ -f /etc/xdg/kscreenlockerrc ] && ! grep -q '^# ALT Center: lock-hide-session-info begin$' /etc/xdg/kscreenlockerrc 2>/dev/null; then cp -a /etc/xdg/kscreenlockerrc /etc/xdg/kscreenlockerrc.altcenter.bak; fi; touch /etc/xdg/kscreenlockerrc; sed -i '/^# ALT Center: lock-hide-session-info begin$/,/^# ALT Center: lock-hide-session-info end$/d' /etc/xdg/kscreenlockerrc 2>/dev/null || true; printf '
# ALT Center: lock-hide-session-info begin
[Greeter][LnF][General]
showMediaControls[$i]=false
# ALT Center: lock-hide-session-info end
' >> /etc/xdg/kscreenlockerrc; if [ -f /etc/xdg/plasmanotifyrc ] && ! grep -q '^# ALT Center: lock-hide-session-info begin$' /etc/xdg/plasmanotifyrc 2>/dev/null; then cp -a /etc/xdg/plasmanotifyrc /etc/xdg/plasmanotifyrc.altcenter.bak; fi; touch /etc/xdg/plasmanotifyrc; sed -i '/^# ALT Center: lock-hide-session-info begin$/,/^# ALT Center: lock-hide-session-info end$/d' /etc/xdg/plasmanotifyrc 2>/dev/null || true; printf '
# ALT Center: lock-hide-session-info begin
[Notifications]
ShowInLockScreen[$i]=false
# ALT Center: lock-hide-session-info end
' >> /etc/xdg/plasmanotifyrc; true

set -e; rm -f /etc/dconf/db/gdm.d/50-altcenter-lock-hide-session-info 2>/dev/null || true; rm -f /etc/dconf/db/local.d/50-altcenter-lock-hide-session-info 2>/dev/null || true; rm -f /etc/dconf/db/local.d/locks/50-altcenter-lock-hide-session-info 2>/dev/null || true; command -v dconf >/dev/null 2>&1 && dconf update 2>/dev/null || true; true

set -e; rm -f /etc/lightdm/lightdm.conf.d/50-altcenter-lock-hide-session-info.conf 2>/dev/null || true; if [ -f /etc/xdg/kscreenlockerrc.altcenter.bak ]; then mv -f /etc/xdg/kscreenlockerrc.altcenter.bak /etc/xdg/kscreenlockerrc; else sed -i '/^# ALT Center: lock-hide-session-info begin$/,/^# ALT Center: lock-hide-session-info end$/d' /etc/xdg/kscreenlockerrc 2>/dev/null || true; fi; if [ -f /etc/xdg/plasmanotifyrc.altcenter.bak ]; then mv -f /etc/xdg/plasmanotifyrc.altcenter.bak /etc/xdg/plasmanotifyrc; else sed -i '/^# ALT Center: lock-hide-session-info begin$/,/^# ALT Center: lock-hide-session-info end$/d' /etc/xdg/plasmanotifyrc 2>/dev/null || true; fi; true

set -e; rm -f /etc/sddm.conf.d/50-altcenter-lock-hide-session-info.conf 2>/dev/null || true; if [ -f /etc/xdg/kscreenlockerrc.altcenter.bak ]; then mv -f /etc/xdg/kscreenlockerrc.altcenter.bak /etc/xdg/kscreenlockerrc; else sed -i '/^# ALT Center: lock-hide-session-info begin$/,/^# ALT Center: lock-hide-session-info end$/d' /etc/xdg/kscreenlockerrc 2>/dev/null || true; fi; if [ -f /etc/xdg/plasmanotifyrc.altcenter.bak ]; then mv -f /etc/xdg/plasmanotifyrc.altcenter.bak /etc/xdg/plasmanotifyrc; else sed -i '/^# ALT Center: lock-hide-session-info begin$/,/^# ALT Center: lock-hide-session-info end$/d' /etc/xdg/plasmanotifyrc 2>/dev/null || true; fi; true

policies.title: Отключить спящие режимы (suspend/hibernate)
policies.section: Настройка учетных записей и управление доступом
policies.description: Маскирование sleep/suspend/hibernate/hybrid-sleep, игнор событий в logind, запрет polkit; профили GNOME/MATE/KDE отключают автосон.
policies.description_en: Mask sleep/suspend/hibernate/hybrid-sleep targets, ignore events in logind, deny via polkit; GNOME/MATE/KDE profiles disable auto-suspend.

run:
set -e; mkdir -p /etc/lightdm/lightdm.conf.d /etc/systemd/logind.conf.d /etc/polkit-1/rules.d /etc/dconf/db/local.d /etc/dconf/db/local.d/locks /etc/xdg; printf '# altcenter-no-sleep-modes
' > /etc/lightdm/lightdm.conf.d/50-altcenter-no-sleep-modes.conf; printf '[Login]
HandleLidSwitch=ignore
HandleLidSwitchExternalPower=ignore
HandleSuspendKey=ignore
HandleHibernateKey=ignore
' > /etc/systemd/logind.conf.d/50-altcenter-no-sleep-modes.conf; systemctl daemon-reload; systemctl mask --now sleep.target suspend.target hibernate.target hybrid-sleep.target 2>/dev/null || true; printf 'polkit.addRule(function(a,s){ if((/^org\.freedesktop\.login1\./).test(a.id) && /(suspend|hibernate|hybrid-sleep)/.test(a.id)) return polkit.Result.NO; if((/^org\.freedesktop\.UPower\./).test(a.id) && /(Suspend|Hibernate)/.test(a.id)) return polkit.Result.NO; });
' > /etc/polkit-1/rules.d/50-altcenter-no-sleep-modes.rules; printf '[org/mate/power-manager]
sleep-computer-ac=uint32 0
sleep-computer-battery=uint32 0
' > /etc/dconf/db/local.d/50-altcenter-no-sleep-modes; printf '/org/mate/power-manager/sleep-computer-ac
/org/mate/power-manager/sleep-computer-battery
' > /etc/dconf/db/local.d/locks/50-altcenter-no-sleep-modes; printf '# altcenter-no-sleep-modes
[AC][SuspendSession]
idleTime=0
suspendType=0
[Battery][SuspendSession]
idleTime=0
suspendType=0
[AC][DPMS]
idleTime=0
[Battery][DPMS]
idleTime=0
' > /etc/xdg/powermanagementprofilesrc; command -v dconf >/dev/null 2>&1 && dconf update 2>/dev/null || true; systemctl reload-or-restart systemd-logind 2>/dev/null || true; true

set -e; mkdir -p /etc/systemd/logind.conf.d /etc/polkit-1/rules.d /etc/dconf/db/local.d /etc/dconf/db/local.d/locks /etc/dconf/db/gdm.d; printf '# altcenter-no-sleep-modes
' > /etc/dconf/db/gdm.d/50-altcenter-no-sleep-modes; printf '[Login]
HandleLidSwitch=ignore
HandleLidSwitchExternalPower=ignore
HandleSuspendKey=ignore
HandleHibernateKey=ignore
' > /etc/systemd/logind.conf.d/50-altcenter-no-sleep-modes.conf; systemctl daemon-reload; systemctl mask --now sleep.target suspend.target hibernate.target hybrid-sleep.target 2>/dev/null || true; printf 'polkit.addRule(function(a,s){ if((/^org\.freedesktop\.login1\./).test(a.id) && /(suspend|hibernate|hybrid-sleep)/.test(a.id)) return polkit.Result.NO; if((/^org\.freedesktop\.UPower\./).test(a.id) && /(Suspend|Hibernate)/.test(a.id)) return polkit.Result.NO; });
' > /etc/polkit-1/rules.d/50-altcenter-no-sleep-modes.rules; printf "[org/gnome/settings-daemon/plugins/power]
sleep-inactive-ac-type='nothing'
sleep-inactive-battery-type='nothing'
" > /etc/dconf/db/local.d/50-altcenter-no-sleep-modes; printf '/org/gnome/settings-daemon/plugins/power/sleep-inactive-ac-type
/org/gnome/settings-daemon/plugins/power/sleep-inactive-battery-type
' > /etc/dconf/db/local.d/locks/50-altcenter-no-sleep-modes; command -v dconf >/dev/null 2>&1 && dconf update 2>/dev/null || true; systemctl reload-or-restart systemd-logind 2>/dev/null || true; true

set -e; mkdir -p /etc/sddm.conf.d /etc/systemd/logind.conf.d /etc/polkit-1/rules.d /etc/xdg; printf '# altcenter-no-sleep-modes
' > /etc/sddm.conf.d/50-altcenter-no-sleep-modes.conf; printf '[Login]
HandleLidSwitch=ignore
HandleLidSwitchExternalPower=ignore
HandleSuspendKey=ignore
HandleHibernateKey=ignore
' > /etc/systemd/logind.conf.d/50-altcenter-no-sleep-modes.conf; systemctl daemon-reload; systemctl mask --now sleep.target suspend.target hibernate.target hybrid-sleep.target 2>/dev/null || true; printf 'polkit.addRule(function(a,s){ if((/^org\.freedesktop\.login1\./).test(a.id) && /(suspend|hibernate|hybrid-sleep)/.test(a.id)) return polkit.Result.NO; if((/^org\.freedesktop\.UPower\./).test(a.id) && /(Suspend|Hibernate)/.test(a.id)) return polkit.Result.NO; });
' > /etc/polkit-1/rules.d/50-altcenter-no-sleep-modes.rules; printf '# altcenter-no-sleep-modes
[AC][SuspendSession]
idleTime=0
suspendType=0
[Battery][SuspendSession]
idleTime=0
suspendType=0
[AC][DPMS]
idleTime=0
[Battery][DPMS]
idleTime=0
' > /etc/xdg/powermanagementprofilesrc; systemctl reload-or-restart systemd-logind 2>/dev/null || true; true

set -e; systemctl unmask sleep.target suspend.target hibernate.target hybrid-sleep.target 2>/dev/null || true; rm -f /etc/lightdm/lightdm.conf.d/50-altcenter-no-sleep-modes.conf 2>/dev/null || true; rm -f /etc/systemd/logind.conf.d/50-altcenter-no-sleep-modes.conf 2>/dev/null || true; rm -f /etc/polkit-1/rules.d/50-altcenter-no-sleep-modes.rules 2>/dev/null || true; rm -f /etc/dconf/db/local.d/50-altcenter-no-sleep-modes 2>/dev/null || true; rm -f /etc/dconf/db/local.d/locks/50-altcenter-no-sleep-modes 2>/dev/null || true; if [ -f /etc/xdg/powermanagementprofilesrc ] && head -n1 /etc/xdg/powermanagementprofilesrc | grep -q '^# altcenter-no-sleep-modes'; then rm -f /etc/xdg/powermanagementprofilesrc; fi; command -v dconf >/dev/null 2>&1 && dconf update 2>/dev/null || true; systemctl daemon-reload; systemctl reload-or-restart systemd-logind 2>/dev/null || true; true

set -e; systemctl unmask sleep.target suspend.target hibernate.target hybrid-sleep.target 2>/dev/null || true; rm -f /etc/dconf/db/gdm.d/50-altcenter-no-sleep-modes 2>/dev/null || true; rm -f /etc/systemd/logind.conf.d/50-altcenter-no-sleep-modes.conf 2>/dev/null || true; rm -f /etc/polkit-1/rules.d/50-altcenter-no-sleep-modes.rules 2>/dev/null || true; rm -f /etc/dconf/db/local.d/50-altcenter-no-sleep-modes 2>/dev/null || true; rm -f /etc/dconf/db/local.d/locks/50-altcenter-no-sleep-modes 2>/dev/null || true; command -v dconf >/dev/null 2>&1 && dconf update 2>/dev/null || true; systemctl daemon-reload; systemctl reload-or-restart systemd-logind 2>/dev/null || true; true

set -e; systemctl unmask sleep.target suspend.target hibernate.target hybrid-sleep.target 2>/dev/null || true; rm -f /etc/sddm.conf.d/50-altcenter-no-sleep-modes.conf 2>/dev/null || true; rm -f /etc/systemd/logind.conf.d/50-altcenter-no-sleep-modes.conf 2>/dev/null || true; rm -f /etc/polkit-1/rules.d/50-altcenter-no-sleep-modes.rules 2>/dev/null || true; if [ -f /etc/xdg/powermanagementprofilesrc ] && head -n1 /etc/xdg/powermanagementprofilesrc | grep -q '^# altcenter-no-sleep-modes'; then rm -f /etc/xdg/powermanagementprofilesrc; fi; systemctl daemon-reload; systemctl reload-or-restart systemd-logind 2>/dev/null || true; true

policies.title: Запрет вывода меню загрузчика
policies.section: Настройка учетных записей и управление доступом
policies.subsection: Разрешение (запрет) действий пользователей, разрешенных до идентификации и аутентификации
policies.description: Скрывает меню GRUB2, устанавливая GRUB_TIMEOUT=0 в /etc/sysconfig/grub2 и выполняя update-grub. Предварительно создаётся резервная копия /etc/sysconfig/grub2.altcenter-grub-hide-boot-menu.bak.
policies.description_en: Hides the GRUB2 menu by setting GRUB_TIMEOUT=0 in /etc/sysconfig/grub2 and running update-grub. Creates a backup /etc/sysconfig/grub2.altcenter-grub-hide-boot-menu.bak.

run: set -e; cfg=/etc/sysconfig/grub2; bak=/etc/sysconfig/grub2.altcenter-grub-hide-boot-menu.bak; mkdir -p /etc/sysconfig /etc/lightdm/lightdm.conf.d; if [ -f "$cfg" ] && [ ! -f "$bak" ]; then cp -a "$cfg" "$bak"; fi; if [ ! -f "$cfg" ]; then : > "$cfg"; fi; if grep -Eq '^[[:space:]]*#?[[:space:]]*GRUB_TIMEOUT=' "$cfg"; then sed -ri 's/^[[:space:]]*#?[[:space:]]*GRUB_TIMEOUT=.*/GRUB_TIMEOUT=0 # altcenter-grub-hide-boot-menu/' "$cfg"; else printf '\nGRUB_TIMEOUT=0 # altcenter-grub-hide-boot-menu\n' >> "$cfg"; fi; command -v update-grub >/dev/null 2>&1 && update-grub 2>/dev/null || true; : > /etc/lightdm/lightdm.conf.d/50-altcenter-grub-hide-boot-menu.conf; true

set -e; cfg=/etc/sysconfig/grub2; bak=/etc/sysconfig/grub2.altcenter-grub-hide-boot-menu.bak; mkdir -p /etc/sysconfig /etc/dconf/db/gdm.d; if [ -f "$cfg" ] && [ ! -f "$bak" ]; then cp -a "$cfg" "$bak"; fi; if [ ! -f "$cfg" ]; then : > "$cfg"; fi; if grep -Eq '^[[:space:]]*#?[[:space:]]*GRUB_TIMEOUT=' "$cfg"; then sed -ri 's/^[[:space:]]*#?[[:space:]]*GRUB_TIMEOUT=.*/GRUB_TIMEOUT=0 # altcenter-grub-hide-boot-menu/' "$cfg"; else printf '\nGRUB_TIMEOUT=0 # altcenter-grub-hide-boot-menu\n' >> "$cfg"; fi; command -v update-grub >/dev/null 2>&1 && update-grub 2>/dev/null || true; : > /etc/dconf/db/gdm.d/50-altcenter-grub-hide-boot-menu; true

set -e; cfg=/etc/sysconfig/grub2; bak=/etc/sysconfig/grub2.altcenter-grub-hide-boot-menu.bak; mkdir -p /etc/sysconfig /etc/sddm.conf.d; if [ -f "$cfg" ] && [ ! -f "$bak" ]; then cp -a "$cfg" "$bak"; fi; if [ ! -f "$cfg" ]; then : > "$cfg"; fi; if grep -Eq '^[[:space:]]*#?[[:space:]]*GRUB_TIMEOUT=' "$cfg"; then sed -ri 's/^[[:space:]]*#?[[:space:]]*GRUB_TIMEOUT=.*/GRUB_TIMEOUT=0 # altcenter-grub-hide-boot-menu/' "$cfg"; else printf '\nGRUB_TIMEOUT=0 # altcenter-grub-hide-boot-menu\n' >> "$cfg"; fi; command -v update-grub >/dev/null 2>&1 && update-grub 2>/dev/null || true; : > /etc/sddm.conf.d/50-altcenter-grub-hide-boot-menu.conf; true

set -e; cfg=/etc/sysconfig/grub2; bak=/etc/sysconfig/grub2.altcenter-grub-hide-boot-menu.bak; if [ -f "$bak" ]; then cp -a "$bak" "$cfg"; rm -f "$bak"; else [ -f "$cfg" ] && sed -ri '/^[[:space:]]*GRUB_TIMEOUT=0[[:space:]]*# altcenter-grub-hide-boot-menu[[:space:]]*$/d' "$cfg" || true; fi; command -v update-grub >/dev/null 2>&1 && update-grub 2>/dev/null || true; rm -f /etc/lightdm/lightdm.conf.d/50-altcenter-grub-hide-boot-menu.conf 2>/dev/null || true; true

set -e; cfg=/etc/sysconfig/grub2; bak=/etc/sysconfig/grub2.altcenter-grub-hide-boot-menu.bak; if [ -f "$bak" ]; then cp -a "$bak" "$cfg"; rm -f "$bak"; else [ -f "$cfg" ] && sed -ri '/^[[:space:]]*GRUB_TIMEOUT=0[[:space:]]*# altcenter-grub-hide-boot-menu[[:space:]]*$/d' "$cfg" || true; fi; command -v update-grub >/dev/null 2>&1 && update-grub 2>/dev/null || true; rm -f /etc/dconf/db/gdm.d/50-altcenter-grub-hide-boot-menu 2>/dev/null || true; true

set -e; cfg=/etc/sysconfig/grub2; bak=/etc/sysconfig/grub2.altcenter-grub-hide-boot-menu.bak; if [ -f "$bak" ]; then cp -a "$bak" "$cfg"; rm -f "$bak"; else [ -f "$cfg" ] && sed -ri '/^[[:space:]]*GRUB_TIMEOUT=0[[:space:]]*# altcenter-grub-hide-boot-menu[[:space:]]*$/d' "$cfg" || true; fi; command -v update-grub >/dev/null 2>&1 && update-grub 2>/dev/null || true; rm -f /etc/sddm.conf.d/50-altcenter-grub-hide-boot-menu.conf 2>/dev/null || true; true

policies.title: Запрет загрузки в режиме восстановления
policies.section: Настройка учетных записей и управление доступом
policies.subsection: Настройка параметров блокирования сеанса доступа после времени бездействия
policies.description: Убирает пункты загрузки в режиме восстановления/фейлсейф, устанавливая GRUB_VMLINUZ_FAILSAFE=false в /etc/sysconfig/grub2 и пересобирая grub.cfg.
policies.description_en: Removes recovery/failsafe boot entries by setting GRUB_VMLINUZ_FAILSAFE=false in /etc/sysconfig/grub2 and rebuilding grub.cfg.

run: set -e; cfg=/etc/sysconfig/grub2; st=/etc/altcenter/policy-state/grub-disable-recovery-mode.prev; mkdir -p /etc/sysconfig /etc/altcenter/policy-state /etc/lightdm/lightdm.conf.d; [ -f "$cfg" ] || : > "$cfg"; [ -f "$st" ] || (grep -E '^[[:space:]]*#?[[:space:]]*GRUB_VMLINUZ_FAILSAFE=' "$cfg" | tail -n1 > "$st" || : > "$st"); sed -ri '/^[[:space:]]*#?[[:space:]]*GRUB_VMLINUZ_FAILSAFE=/d' "$cfg" || true; printf '\nGRUB_VMLINUZ_FAILSAFE=false # altcenter-grub-disable-recovery-mode\n' >> "$cfg"; if command -v update-grub >/dev/null 2>&1; then update-grub 2>/dev/null || true; elif command -v grub-mkconfig >/dev/null 2>&1; then out=/boot/grub/grub.cfg; [ -f /boot/grub2/grub.cfg ] && out=/boot/grub2/grub.cfg; grub-mkconfig -o "$out" 2>/dev/null || true; fi; : > /etc/lightdm/lightdm.conf.d/50-altcenter-grub-disable-recovery-mode.conf; true

set -e; cfg=/etc/sysconfig/grub2; st=/etc/altcenter/policy-state/grub-disable-recovery-mode.prev; mkdir -p /etc/sysconfig /etc/altcenter/policy-state /etc/dconf/db/gdm.d; [ -f "$cfg" ] || : > "$cfg"; [ -f "$st" ] || (grep -E '^[[:space:]]*#?[[:space:]]*GRUB_VMLINUZ_FAILSAFE=' "$cfg" | tail -n1 > "$st" || : > "$st"); sed -ri '/^[[:space:]]*#?[[:space:]]*GRUB_VMLINUZ_FAILSAFE=/d' "$cfg" || true; printf '\nGRUB_VMLINUZ_FAILSAFE=false # altcenter-grub-disable-recovery-mode\n' >> "$cfg"; if command -v update-grub >/dev/null 2>&1; then update-grub 2>/dev/null || true; elif command -v grub-mkconfig >/dev/null 2>&1; then out=/boot/grub/grub.cfg; [ -f /boot/grub2/grub.cfg ] && out=/boot/grub2/grub.cfg; grub-mkconfig -o "$out" 2>/dev/null || true; fi; : > /etc/dconf/db/gdm.d/50-altcenter-grub-disable-recovery-mode; true

set -e; cfg=/etc/sysconfig/grub2; st=/etc/altcenter/policy-state/grub-disable-recovery-mode.prev; mkdir -p /etc/sysconfig /etc/altcenter/policy-state /etc/sddm.conf.d; [ -f "$cfg" ] || : > "$cfg"; [ -f "$st" ] || (grep -E '^[[:space:]]*#?[[:space:]]*GRUB_VMLINUZ_FAILSAFE=' "$cfg" | tail -n1 > "$st" || : > "$st"); sed -ri '/^[[:space:]]*#?[[:space:]]*GRUB_VMLINUZ_FAILSAFE=/d' "$cfg" || true; printf '\nGRUB_VMLINUZ_FAILSAFE=false # altcenter-grub-disable-recovery-mode\n' >> "$cfg"; if command -v update-grub >/dev/null 2>&1; then update-grub 2>/dev/null || true; elif command -v grub-mkconfig >/dev/null 2>&1; then out=/boot/grub/grub.cfg; [ -f /boot/grub2/grub.cfg ] && out=/boot/grub2/grub.cfg; grub-mkconfig -o "$out" 2>/dev/null || true; fi; : > /etc/sddm.conf.d/50-altcenter-grub-disable-recovery-mode.conf; true

set -e; cfg=/etc/sysconfig/grub2; st=/etc/altcenter/policy-state/grub-disable-recovery-mode.prev; old=""; [ -f "$st" ] && old="$(cat "$st")" || true; rm -f "$st" 2>/dev/null || true; [ -f "$cfg" ] || : > "$cfg"; sed -ri '/^[[:space:]]*#?[[:space:]]*GRUB_VMLINUZ_FAILSAFE=/d' "$cfg" || true; [ -n "$old" ] && printf '\n%s\n' "$old" >> "$cfg" || true; if command -v update-grub >/dev/null 2>&1; then update-grub 2>/dev/null || true; elif command -v grub-mkconfig >/dev/null 2>&1; then out=/boot/grub/grub.cfg; [ -f /boot/grub2/grub.cfg ] && out=/boot/grub2/grub.cfg; grub-mkconfig -o "$out" 2>/dev/null || true; fi; rm -f /etc/lightdm/lightdm.conf.d/50-altcenter-grub-disable-recovery-mode.conf 2>/dev/null || true; true

set -e; cfg=/etc/sysconfig/grub2; st=/etc/altcenter/policy-state/grub-disable-recovery-mode.prev; old=""; [ -f "$st" ] && old="$(cat "$st")" || true; rm -f "$st" 2>/dev/null || true; [ -f "$cfg" ] || : > "$cfg"; sed -ri '/^[[:space:]]*#?[[:space:]]*GRUB_VMLINUZ_FAILSAFE=/d' "$cfg" || true; [ -n "$old" ] && printf '\n%s\n' "$old" >> "$cfg" || true; if command -v update-grub >/dev/null 2>&1; then update-grub 2>/dev/null || true; elif command -v grub-mkconfig >/dev/null 2>&1; then out=/boot/grub/grub.cfg; [ -f /boot/grub2/grub.cfg ] && out=/boot/grub2/grub.cfg; grub-mkconfig -o "$out" 2>/dev/null || true; fi; rm -f /etc/dconf/db/gdm.d/50-altcenter-grub-disable-recovery-mode 2>/dev/null || true; true

set -e; cfg=/etc/sysconfig/grub2; st=/etc/altcenter/policy-state/grub-disable-recovery-mode.prev; old=""; [ -f "$st" ] && old="$(cat "$st")" || true; rm -f "$st" 2>/dev/null || true; [ -f "$cfg" ] || : > "$cfg"; sed -ri '/^[[:space:]]*#?[[:space:]]*GRUB_VMLINUZ_FAILSAFE=/d' "$cfg" || true; [ -n "$old" ] && printf '\n%s\n' "$old" >> "$cfg" || true; if command -v update-grub >/dev/null 2>&1; then update-grub 2>/dev/null || true; elif command -v grub-mkconfig >/dev/null 2>&1; then out=/boot/grub/grub.cfg; [ -f /boot/grub2/grub.cfg ] && out=/boot/grub2/grub.cfg; grub-mkconfig -o "$out" 2>/dev/null || true; fi; rm -f /etc/sddm.conf.d/50-altcenter-grub-disable-recovery-mode.conf 2>/dev/null || true; true

policies.title: Запрет удаленного доступа по ssh с правами root
policies.title_en: Disallow remote SSH access as root
policies.description: Запрещает удаленный вход по SSH с правами root через параметр PermitRootLogin no.
policies.description_en: Disallows remote SSH login as root by setting PermitRootLogin no.

run:
set -e; mkdir -p /etc/lightdm/lightdm.conf.d /etc/sddm.conf.d /etc/dconf/db/gdm.d; printf 'policy:deny-root-ssh-login
PermitRootLogin no
' > /etc/lightdm/lightdm.conf.d/50-altcenter-deny-root-ssh-login.conf; printf 'policy:deny-root-ssh-login
PermitRootLogin no
' > /etc/sddm.conf.d/50-altcenter-deny-root-ssh-login.conf; printf 'policy:deny-root-ssh-login
PermitRootLogin no
' > /etc/dconf/db/gdm.d/50-altcenter-deny-root-ssh-login

set -e; [ -f /etc/openssh/sshd_config ] || exit 1; grep -qE '^[[:space:]]*PermitRootLogin[[:space:]]+' /etc/openssh/sshd_config && sed -ri 's|^[[:space:]]*#?[[:space:]]*PermitRootLogin[[:space:]]+.*|PermitRootLogin no|' /etc/openssh/sshd_config || printf '\nPermitRootLogin no\n' >> /etc/openssh/sshd_config
set -e; systemctl reload sshd.service 2>/dev/null || systemctl restart sshd.service 2>/dev/null || service sshd reload 2>/dev/null || service sshd restart 2>/dev/null || true

set -e; rm -f /etc/lightdm/lightdm.conf.d/50-altcenter-deny-root-ssh-login.conf 2>/dev/null || true; rm -f /etc/sddm.conf.d/50-altcenter-deny-root-ssh-login.conf 2>/dev/null || true; rm -f /etc/dconf/db/gdm.d/50-altcenter-deny-root-ssh-login 2>/dev/null || true
set -e; systemctl reload sshd.service 2>/dev/null || systemctl restart sshd.service 2>/dev/null || service sshd reload 2>/dev/null || service sshd restart 2>/dev/null || true
